scripts.dev: yarn workspace @dokkimi/config build && yarn workspace @dokkimi/platform build && yarn workspace @dokkimi/telemetry build && yarn workspace @dokkimi/definition-validator build && yarn workspace @dokkimi/definition-resolver build && yarn workspace @dokkimi/service-manager build && yarn workspace @dokkimi/mcp build && tsc && chmod +x dist/bin/dokkimi.js && cp ../../shared/docs/dokkimi-instructions.md dist/dokkimi-instructions.md && DEPLOYMENT_TYPE=desktop NODE_ENV=development concurrently -n cfg,plat,tel,val,res,sm,mcp,ct,tsc -c gray,gray,gray,gray,gray,gray,gray,blue,green "yarn workspace @dokkimi/config dev" "yarn workspace @dokkimi/platform dev" "yarn workspace @dokkimi/telemetry dev" "yarn workspace @dokkimi/definition-validator dev" "yarn workspace @dokkimi/definition-resolver dev" "yarn workspace @dokkimi/service-manager dev" "yarn workspace @dokkimi/mcp dev" "yarn workspace control-tower start:dev" "tsc --watch --preserveWatchOutput"
